name: miroshark
description: Miroshark - unified operator terminal for graph-native swarm trading

scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.dev:full: concurrently --kill-others -n "backend,signal,execution,app" -c "green,magenta,blue,cyan" "npm run backend" "npm run signal" "npm run execution" "npm run dev"
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run python run.py
scripts.signal: cd services && uv run --env-file ../.env python -m meridian_signal.api
scripts.execution: cd services && uv run --env-file ../.env python -m execution_router.api
scripts.orchestrator: cd services && uv run --env-file ../.env python -m orchestrator
